title: Ben 10 Universe [Discontinued]
description: This mod will no longer be updated
body:
In this mod you can get Omnitrix like in Ben 10 series

Prototype Omnitrix:

Appearance of the device:

 Craft:

materials:

Karodium shard 64

netherite ingot 4

Galvanic microcircuit 2

Galvanic ingot 2

Prototype Omnitrix core 1

 How to use:

  • To activate, place the Omnitrix in the spare hand slot.
  • To turn on the clock press (X by default)
  • To turn off the clock, press (C by default)
  • To open the watch settings press (RShift by default)
  • change alien list (B by default)

 Functions:

  • Master Control (Code: 3 9)

gives the ability to transform into a human and does not consume energy when the owner is in alien form

-------------------------------------------------------

  • Self-destruct mode (not finished)

explodes the clock after a while (be careful as the explosion can hit buildings and destroy the terrain)

-------------------------------------------------------

  • Recalibration (To activate you need to open 20 aliens)

after some time your Omnitrix Prototype will be calibrated and you will receive a Relibrated Omnitrix

-------------------------------------------------------

  • Detaching the core

if you had self-destruct mode enabled, then when you turn off the kernel, self-destruct mode will be disabled

-------------------------------------------------------

  • Omnitrix decouple
takes your watch off

 

 

 

 

Commands for the mod

commands for omnitrix:
/omnitrix @p clear - clears all data for omnitrix
/omnitrix @p energy <a number from 0 to 100 percent> - omnitrix battery charge settings
/omnitrix @p unlock alien <alien name> - opens 1 of the selected alien
/omnitrix @p unlock alien all - unlocks all aliens
/omnitrix @p unlock function decouple_core - opens the kernel detach function
/omnitrix @p unlock function decouple_omnitrix - unlocks the Omnitrix detachment function

/attribute @p ben_10_universe:master_control_os base set 1 - unlocks master control for the omnitrix prototype
/attribute @p ben_10_universe:master_control_af base set 1 - unlocks master control of the recalibrated omnitrix
/attribute @p ben_10_universe:master_control_uaf base set 1 -unlocks master control for the ultimatrix
/attribute @p ben_10_universe:master_control_ov base set 1 - unlocks master control for the compleat omnitrix

commands for aliens:
/attribute @p ben_10_universe:<alien name>_xp base set  <a number from 0 to 100 percent> - gives experience to the selected alien
